# Attomik AI Visibility Audit
# https://audit.attomik.co

## What this is
A free AI visibility audit tool for CPG and ecommerce brands.
Scan any website URL and receive a score (0-100) showing how
visible your brand is to AI search engines including ChatGPT,
Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Microsoft Copilot, and Claude.

## About Attomik
Attomik is a full-service ecommerce growth partner for CPG brands.
We specialize in AI visibility optimization, SEO, Shopify growth,
paid social, and email retention.

Contact: pablo@attomik.co
Website: https://attomik.co

## What we score
- Structured data / schema markup (+25 pts)
- Content depth and quality (+18 pts)
- Meta title, description, H1 signals (+15 pts)
- Open Graph tags (+10 pts)
- Image alt text (+8 pts)
- Technical SEO foundation (+8 pts)

## Brands we've worked with
Khloud, Jolene Coffee, Good Twin, Amass, Gameplan Skincare,
La Monjita, Afterdream
